message:
docs(readme): fix index.drop_duplicates(keep) wrong fn + bogus ? (br-uj2np / fd90.116)

fd90.116: line 1607 in Duplicate Handling showed:

  let unique_idx = index.drop_duplicates(DuplicateKeep::First)?;

Two compile errors against crates/fp-index/src/lib.rs:
- line 638: pub fn drop_duplicates(&self) -> Self  (no arg, no Result)
- line 646: pub fn drop_duplicates_keep(&self, keep: DuplicateKeep) -> Self
              (takes keep, but still returns Self — not Result)

A user copy-pasting would hit:
  E0061: this method takes 0 arguments but 1 argument was supplied
  E0277: the ? operator can only be applied to types implementing
         Try (Self != Result)

Fix: drop_duplicates → drop_duplicates_keep, drop the ? since the
function returns Index directly. Inline note clarifies the contract.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
